title: Canonical Edit Plan
description: The single edit-plan shape produced by buildCanonicalEditPlan() for BOTH proof and full render modes. This deliberately replaces the golden system's three branching schema_version strings ('7.0-cinematic-proof' / '6.3-motion-hook-evidence-proof' / '5.1-evidence-led-full') with one constant schema_version plus an explicit mode + frame_range pair -- see docs/migration-plan.md section 1-2. duration_frames is always the canonical FULL timeline length in both modes; frame_range.end_frame is what varies (<=duration_frames for proof, ==duration_frames for full).

duration_frames.description: Canonical full-timeline duration -- identical value in proof and full mode.

quality_policy.description: Editorial policy fractions/flags read from editorial_blueprint.json.global_rules, not hardcoded per-mode duplicates.
